# vowifi-go local copy

This directory contains the local replacement for `github.com/iniwex5/vowifi-go`.

Source: `vendor/github.com/sunnyhmz7010/vowifi-go` from `https://github.com/Dilrvvr/vohive.git` at commit `7cf90bddefeaf2c00804c4932631385b3b2ba016`.

The copied vendored module did not include a standalone LICENSE or NOTICE file.
